title: anthyllis vulneraria var. vitellina
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. vitellina, also known as kidney vetch or yellow vetch, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as treating urinary issues, relieving gastrointestinal problems, and reducing menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Anthyllis vulneraria var. vitellina can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
